description: Knowledge base for the PowerApps chat bot. Each item contains keywords and a corresponding answer.

columns.description: The question or keywords that trigger this answer. Separate multiple keywords with commas.
The answer to return when the keywords are matched.
Optional category to group related Q&A pairs.
Priority for ordering results when multiple matches are found. Lower number = higher priority.
Set to No to disable this Q&A pair without deleting it.

sampleData.Title: hours, office hours, when open
sampleData.Answer: Our office is open Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time.

sampleData.Title: contact, phone number, email, reach
sampleData.Answer: You can reach our team at support@yourcompany.com or call us at (555) 123-4567.

sampleData.Title: password reset, forgot password, login help
sampleData.Answer: To reset your password, go to the IT portal at https://itportal.yourcompany.com and click 'Forgot Password'. If you need further help, contact IT at it-support@yourcompany.com.

sampleData.Title: vacation, PTO, time off, leave request
sampleData.Answer: To request time off, submit a request through the HR portal. Please submit requests at least 2 weeks in advance. For questions, contact HR at hr@yourcompany.com.

sampleData.Title: expense, reimbursement, receipt
sampleData.Answer: Submit expense reports via the Finance portal within 30 days of the expense. Attach all receipts and include the business purpose. Approvals typically take 5-7 business days.

setupInstructions: 4. Add the columns described above (Title already exists by default).
5. Populate with your Q&A content using the sample data as a guide.
6. Note the SharePoint site URL and list name — you will need these when configuring the Power Automate flow.
